ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "epic" TEXT /* The epic under which the user story falls */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* The role of the user for whom the story is created */,
  "story_text" TEXT /* The actual text of the user story detailing the requirement */,
  "dependency" TEXT /* Any dependencies related to the user story */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or additional information about the user story */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user story (e.g., New, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the user story (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_epic FOREIGN KEY ("epic") REFERENCES epics ("epic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_dependency FOREIGN KEY ("dependency") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_user_role FOREIGN KEY ("user_role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login to the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flood warning */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the Duty Officer who issued the warning */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* The geographical area where the warning is applicable */,
  "issue_time" TEXT /* The time at which the warning was issued */,
  "warning_details" TEXT /* Details of the flood warning */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the flood warning (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* The time at which the warning will expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the warning (e.g., Active, Expired, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the warning was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epics" (
  "epic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epic */,
  "epic_name" TEXT /* Name of the epic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the epic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the epic (e.g., Planning, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the epic */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the epic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the epic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the epic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epic_id")
)
